title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 311.315 - Manufacturing a false identification, offense of — penalty
text:
311.315.  Manufacturing a false identification, offense of — penalty. — 1.  A person commits the offense of manufacturing a false identification if he or she possesses any means of identification for the purpose of manufacturing and providing or selling a false identification card to a person under the age of twenty-one for the purpose of purchasing or obtaining alcohol.
  2.  The offense of manufacturing a false identification is a class A misdemeanor.
(L. 2014 S.B. 491) 
Effective 1-01-17
